headline: Robinhood's $695 Platinum Card Targets American Express's Most Profitable Franchise, BofA Warns
summary: Something unusual is unfolding in the super-premium credit card market, and American Express Company is suddenly facing a new challenger from an unexpected corner of finance. Trading platform Robinhood Markets Inc. is launching a $695-per-year Platinum card, directly challenging the high-margin credit card segment that has long been dominated by American Express and its flagship Platinum card. Wall Street took notice quickly. In a note Thursday, Bank of America analyst Mihir Bhatia described the

headline: Jim Cramer on Robinhood: “The Question Is, Would You Buy It Now? And the Answer Is a Resounding Yes”
summary: Robinhood Markets, Inc. (NASDAQ:HOOD) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer talked about. A caller asked if Cramer thinks the stock is going back to $145 or higher. He remarked: Let’s upend this one… Let’s forget where we bought it and think where we think it could go to. If I could buy Robinhood at […]

headline: Consumer Tech News (March 2-6): Major Chip Earnings, Trump Refuted Negotiations With Anthropic AI & More
summary: Major market headlines include AI regulation debates, Nvidia chip export uncertainty, Broadcom earnings, and strategic moves by Netflix, Meta, Amazon, and CrowdStrike across technology sectors.
